mapper.select: select id from users where email = #{email} limit 1
select id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, google_subject, auth_token, auth_token_expires_at, status from users where google_subject = #{googleSubject} limit 1

insert into users ( email, password_hash, nickname, status, google_subject, profile_image_url, last_login_at ) values ( #{email}, 'GOOGLE_AUTH', #{nickname}, 'ACTIVE', #{googleSubject}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{lastLoginAt} ) on conflict (email) do update set nickname = excluded.nickname, status = 'ACTIVE', google_subject = excluded.google_subject, profile_image_url = excluded.profile_image_url, last_login_at = excluded.last_login_at returning id
mapper.update: update users set email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, status = 'ACTIVE', google_subject = #{googleSubject}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} where id = #{userId}
update users set auth_token = null, auth_token_expires_at = null where id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, google_subject, auth_token, auth_token_expires_at, status from users where auth_token = #{authToken} and auth_token_expires_at > now() and status = 'ACTIVE' limit 1
select distinct u.id from users u join portfolio_items pi on pi.user_id = u.id where u.status = 'ACTIVE' and pi.is_active = true order by u.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into users ( email, password_hash, nickname, status ) values ( 'dev@maemoji.local', 'LOCAL_DEV_ONLY', 'MaeMoJi DEV USER', 'ACTIVE' ) on conflict (email) do nothing
